ability.en: Each night*, choose a player: if they are or become drunk or poisoned tonight, you die.
ability.es-419: Cada noche*, escoge un jugador: si él está, o se vuelve, borracho o envenenado esta noche, tú mueres.
ability.sv: Varje natt* väljer du en spelare; du dör om hen är eller blir full eller förgiftad inatt.
ability.zh-Hans: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名玩家：如果当晚他醉酒或中毒，你死亡。
ability.cn: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名玩家：如果当晚他醉酒或中毒，你死亡。

flavor_text.en: "Ladies and gentlemen, hold fast to your hats, for I shall defy the very laws of gravity and dance upon the air, a marvel of agility and daring, all for your delight and wonder!"
flavor_text.es-419: Bienvenidos todos al espectáculo más grande en el planeta.
flavor_text.sv: Välkomna, alla och envar, till världens bästa föreställning.
flavor_text.zh-Hans: 列位看官，请扶好帽盔，我将逆天而行，踏空起舞！身如飞燕，胆若雷霆，只为博君一笑一惊。
flavor_text.cn: “列位看官，请扶好帽盔，我将逆天而行，踏空起舞！身如飞燕，胆若雷霆，只为博君一笑一惊！”

other_nights.zh-Hans: 杂技演员选择一名玩家。:reminder:

how_to_run.cn:
除首个夜晚以外的每个夜晚，唤醒杂技演员。让杂技演员指向一名玩家。将“被选择”提示标记放置到所选玩家的角色标记旁。让杂技演员重新入睡。
如果被选择的玩家在当晚任何时刻醉酒或中毒，杂技演员死亡——在杂技演员的角色标记旁放置“死亡”提示标记并放置帷幕标记。
how_to_run.en:
Each night except the first, wake the Acrobat. They point to a player. Put the Acrobat to sleep.
If the player the Acrobat pointed to is drunk or poisoned, or becomes drunk or poisoned at any time tonight, the Acrobat dies.

cn: 首个夜晚，半兽人因为寡妇而中毒了。在第二个夜晚，杂技演员选择了中毒的半兽人，杂技演员死亡。
杂技演员选择了清醒健康的街头风琴手。街头风琴手选择“醉酒”。现在杂技演员选择的街头风琴手醉酒了。杂技演员死亡。
杂技演员选择了酒鬼。杂技演员死亡。
en: The Sailor chooses the Assassin, and the Storyteller makes the Sailor drunk. The Acrobat chooses the Sailor, and dies because the Sailor is drunk.
The Acrobat chooses the Tinker, who is sober and healthy. Nothing happens.
The Acrobat chooses the Preacher. Later that night, the Pukka poisons the Preacher. The Acrobat dies, because the Preacher is no longer healthy.
